laws.title: Michigan Minimum Wage — $10.33/hr (2025)
laws.summary: Michigan minimum wage increased to $10.33/hour effective January 1, 2025. This establishes an even higher minimum for tipped employees who must earn at least $3.74/hn
compliance_actions: Ensure all Michigan employees earn at least $10.33/hr « even for those takes IB leave — any length of leave
For tipped employees: Ensure wages plus tips equal at least $10.33/hr; if not, treat as a shortfall
Post the Michigan minimum wage poster
